item.title: 'Oh god! Who built this?': The origin of the WWE Elimination Chamber
item.description: At the 2002 Survivor Series, six WWE superstars entered the Elimination Chamber. We look back at that night.

item.title: Men's Bracketology: Duke's ascension to No. 1 overall was inevitable
item.description: It was only a matter of time until a path opened for the Blue Devils, who ride their win over Michigan to the top.

item.title: Women's Bracketology: How two upsets turned the ACC into a nine-bid league
item.description: Sometimes one big win can elevate a team off the bubble. Clemson and Virginia got those victories Sunday.

item.title: Falcons GM: QB Cousins to be released March 11
item.description: New Falcons GM Ian Cunningham has informed QB Kirk Cousins that the team will release him on March 11, the first day of the league year, Cunningham sa...

item.title: Sale signs 1-year, $27M extension with Braves
item.description: Chris Sale and the Braves are in agreement on a one-year, $27 million contract extension for 2027 that includes a club option for 2028.
